        add_technology = camouflage
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_rangers â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_rangers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_rangers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paratroopers â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_tech = utility_helicopter_1
        }
        add_technology = paratroopers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_rifle_upgrade2 â€” 2003
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2003 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_rifle_upgrade2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons2 â€” 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons2 â€” 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # camouflage2 â€” 2006
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = camouflage2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2006 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = camouflage2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_rifle_upgrade3 â€” 2009
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2009 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_rifle_upgrade3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # upgraded_infantry_weapons1 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = upgraded_infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = upgraded_infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_rifle_upgrade4 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_rifle_upgrade4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons3 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

# â”€â”€ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (12 techs) â”€â”€

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=2018 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=2022 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank4
#   year=2032 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_the_fire_rises = {
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank1 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank2 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis â€” 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis â€” 2022
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2022 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank3 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tank4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (17 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry1]

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry3]

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=2021 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=2021 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2021 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry4]

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=2027 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry4
#   year=2027 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
#   year=2036 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=2036 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry5
#   year=2036 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_the_fire_rises = {
    # mechanised_infantry â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry1 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry1 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_tech = mechanised_infantry1
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry2 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 â€” 2012
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2012 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_tech = mechanised_infantry3
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 â€” 2021
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2021 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 â€” 2021
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2021 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry3 â€” 2021
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2021 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            has_tech = mechanised_infantry4
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry4 â€” 2027
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2027 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry4 â€” 2027
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2027 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 â€” 2036
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2036 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry5 â€” 2036
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2036 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_mechanized_infantry5 â€” 2036
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2036 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = light_mechanized_infantry5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=2020 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=2024 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_the_fire_rises = {
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=2032 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_the_fire_rises = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MOTORISED (4 techs) â”€â”€

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry2
#   year=2024 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry3
#   year=2036 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_the_fire_rises = {
    # tech_trucks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry2 â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry3 â€” 2036
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2036 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

    # tech_recon_focus_bonus â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_engineer_tech â€” 1938

            NOT = { has_tech = night_vision5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2027 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = night_vision5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company3 â€” 2028
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2028 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police4 â€” 2032

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company4 â€” 2032
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2032 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # night_vision6 â€” 2033
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = night_vision6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2033 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = night_vision6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=2038 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_the_fire_rises = {
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_spaa â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_spaa â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_td â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_art â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_spaa â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # JAP_lighter_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = JAP_lighter_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = JAP_lighter_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # GER_heavy_armored_car â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = GER_heavy_armored_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = GER_heavy_armored_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        }
        add_technology = amphibious_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_1 â€” 2018
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2018 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # blow_out_compartment_tech â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = blow_out_compartment_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = blow_out_compartment_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # third_gen_nv_tech â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = third_gen_nv_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = third_gen_nv_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_2 â€” 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank4 â€” 2021
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2021 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heat_tech â€” 2021
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heat_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2021 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = heat_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # turret_mounted_atgm_tech â€” 2021
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = turret_mounted_atgm_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2021 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = turret_mounted_atgm_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # apfsds_tech â€” 2022
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = apfsds_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2022 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = apfsds_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # auto_cannon_tech â€” 2022
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = auto_cannon_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2022 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = auto_cannon_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_3 â€” 2022
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2022 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heatfs_tech â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heatfs_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = heatfs_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # turret_mounted_manpad_tech â€” 2024
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = turret_mounted_manpad_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2024 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = turret_mounted_manpad_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
